originalTitle: Google launches Wear OS 7 with Live Updates and a battery life boost
summary: Google's Wear OS 7 update is starting to roll out today for the Pixel Watch 2, 3, and 4, adding a new Live Updates feature that tracks live events from your Android smartwatch. Live Updates will now sync with Wear OS devices, so updates like sports scores or an ongoing meal delivery will show up […]
content: Google’s Wear OS 7 update is starting to roll out today for the Pixel Watch 2, 3, and 4, adding a new Live Updates feature that tracks live events from your Android smartwatch. Live Updates will now sync with Wear OS devices, so updates like sports scores or an ongoing meal delivery will show up on both your watch and your phone. You might also notice your watch lasting a little longer — Google claims Wear OS 7 offers up to 10 percent more battery life than Wear OS 6.  Wear OS 7 will also introduce some new Gemini Intelligence features, but Google says these aren’t launching until “later this year.” They’ll include Create My Widget, which you can use to generate custom Wear OS widgets using natural language prompts. Google says Gemini will also be able to handle multi-step app automation in Wear OS 7, such as making a reservation or placing a restaurant order from your watch. Wear OS 7 will update Gemini with Google’s new “neural expressive” design and add support for Personal Intelligence, which pulls data from connected Google apps to inform suggestions from Gemini. [Image: https://platform.theverge.com/wp-content/uploads/sites/2/2026/06/google-wear-os-7-audio-larger.png?quality=90&strip=all] Controlling media from your watch is also getting easier with a new output switcher, where you can move audio output from one connected device to another, like headphones or a Nest speaker. Google says smart glasses like the ones we saw at I/O last month will be able to connect to Wear OS 7 so you can preview photos taken with the glasses on your watch.  Third-party app developers can also now add Wear OS Widgets that should be easier for them to develop and more dynamic than the custom Tiles that launched in 2019. For devices that don’t get the update, Google says apps can continue to support Tiles too, or the widgets will be displayed as a full-screen tile on Wear OS 4, 5, and 6.  Last but not least, Google’s Emergency Sharing feature can also now automatically call your selected list of emergency contacts in addition to emergency services if your Pixel Watch detects a fall, loss of pulse, or a car crash.
chineseTitle: 谷歌推出具有实时更新和电池寿命提升功能的 Wear OS 7
chineseSummary: Google 的 Wear OS 7 更新今天开始针对 Pixel Watch 2、3 和 4 推出，添加了新的实时更新功能，可跟踪 Android 智能手表的实时事件。实时更新现在将与 Wear OS 设备同步，因此体育比分或正在进行的送餐等更新将显示 [...]
chineseContent: Google 的 Wear OS 7 更新今天开始针对 Pixel Watch 2、3 和 4 推出，添加了新的实时更新功能，可跟踪 Android 智能手表的实时事件。实时更新现在将与 Wear OS 设备同步，因此体育比分或正在进行的送餐等更新将同时显示在您的手表和手机上。您可能还会注意到您的手表续航时间更长一些 - Google 声称 Wear OS 7 的电池续航时间比 Wear OS 6 长 10%。Wear OS 7 还将引入一些新的 Gemini Intelligence 功能，但 Google 表示这些功能要到“今年晚些时候”才会推出。它们将包括“创建我的小部件”，您可以使用它来使用自然语言提示生成自定义 Wear OS 小部件。谷歌表示，Gemini 还能够在 Wear OS 7 中处理多步骤应用程序自动化，例如通过手表进行预订或下餐厅订单。 Wear OS 7 将使用谷歌新的“神经表达”设计更新 Gemini，并增加对个人智能的支持，该智能可以从连接的谷歌应用程序中提取数据，以告知 Gemini 的建议。 [图片：https://platform.theverge.com/wp-content/uploads/sites/2/2026/06/google-wear-os-7-audio-larger.png?quality=90&strip=all] 通过新的输出切换器，从手表控制媒体也变得更加容易，您可以在其中将音频输出从一个连接的设备移动到另一个连接的设备，例如耳机或 Nest 扬声器。谷歌表示，我们上个月在 I/O 上看到的智能眼镜将能够连接到 Wear OS 7，这样你就可以在手表上预览用眼镜拍摄的照片。  第三方应用程序开发人员现在还可以添加 Wear OS Widgets，这对他们来说应该更容易开发，并且比 2019 年推出的自定义 Tiles 更动态。谷歌表示，对于没有获得更新的设备，应用程序
whyItMatters: 这条信息属于 AI 与科技趋势信号，适合用于观察工具选型、产品机会、开发者关注点和技术路线变化。
